column1: nova-pouch-neo-brutal.png|Bold neo-brutalist app icon for "Nova Pouch". Asymmetric pouch silhouette, chunky geometric cutouts, vivid red blue green blocks, off-white backdrop, hard drop shadows, editorial graphic design energy, unmistakable shape, no text, no fantasy stars.

nova-pouch-swiss-grid.png|Swiss modernist logo icon for "Nova Pouch". Precise grid-based pouch emblem, black and warm ivory palette with tiny RGB tabs, disciplined negative space, premium product identity, highly distinctive silhouette, no text.

nova-pouch-y2k-chrome.png|Refined Y2K chrome icon for "Nova Pouch". Polished metallic pouch symbol, liquid reflections, restrained dark gradient background, three floating accent orbs in red blue green, fashionable but clean, no text.

nova-pouch-paper-cut.png|Paper-cut layered icon for "Nova Pouch". Multi-layer cut-paper pouch shape, tactile shadows, bold coral cobalt emerald accents, contemporary illustration style, centered, crisp, no text.

nova-pouch-isometric-device.png|Isometric product-style icon for "Nova Pouch". Compact futuristic pouch device with three cartridge lights red blue green, clean industrial design, minimal scene, modern game brand, no text.

nova-pouch-kinetic-stripes.png|Dynamic modern icon for "Nova Pouch". Pouch glyph with kinetic racing stripes and directional motion arcs, energetic sports-tech vibe, red blue green accents, strong contrast, distinctive and youthful, no text.

nova-pouch-monoline-signature.png|Elegant monoline emblem for "Nova Pouch". Continuous-line custom pouch mark with one signature curve, matte charcoal base and subtle RGB corner accents, luxury-tech branding feel, minimal yet iconic, no text.

nova-pouch-mascot-clean.png|Characterful but clean vector icon for "Nova Pouch". Friendly pouch mascot reduced to simple geometric forms, bold outline, premium sticker-like mark, modern game identity, red blue green accents, no text.
